summary: Full Stack Developer with 5 years of experience in Python, Java, and React. Skilled in cloud infrastructure (AWS), containerization (Docker/K8s), and ML model deployment.
Data Scientist with expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and statistical analysis. Experience with TensorFlow, PyTorch, and data visualization tools.
Frontend Engineer specializing in React and Angular with 3 years of experience building responsive, accessible web applications.
Financial Analyst with 6 years in banking and fintech. Expert in risk management, compliance, and financial modeling using Python and SQL.
DevOps Engineer with 7+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and container orchestration across AWS and Azure.
Health Informatics Specialist with experience in clinical data systems, HIPAA compliance, and public health analytics.
Digital Marketing Manager with 5 years of experience in SEO, paid advertising, and content strategy for B2B SaaS companies.
UX/UI Designer with expertise in Figma, user research, and design systems. 3 years creating intuitive interfaces for mobile and web products.
ML Engineer with 6 years experience building production ML pipelines. Expert in NLP, computer vision, and distributed computing with Spark.
Backend Engineer specializing in Java and Spring Boot microservices. 5 years building scalable, distributed systems with Kafka and Redis.
